# platformStartExecution

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformStartExecution

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformStartExecutionMutation(); mutate({ input: '<PlatformStartExecutionInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformStartExecutionMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformStartExecutionMutation();
mutate({ input: '<PlatformStartExecutionInput>' });
```
